body: Files: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/README.md; docs/PUBLICATION_QUEUE.md; _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_KB_FRONT_DOOR_REFRESH_2026-06-14.md. Documentation-only; no publication, push, service write, provider call, credential read, or live system change.
constraints: Documentation-only; no raw secrets; no publication or external writes.
evidence_refs: stale-count/read-order sweep => no findings; python scripts/dan_pre_publish_gate.py . => PASS; verify_floor => True
requested_output: Treat KB front-door stale baseline drift as closed. Future patches should preserve 434/434 baseline and keep public release, benchmark, push, and posting actions owner-gated.
summary: Codex refreshed the A.i KB front door and publication queue to the current 434-test baseline. README read order now points to STATE_OF_SYSTEM_2026-06-14 as current; older snapshots marked superseded; active Triad publication queue metadata now uses 434/434 evidence. Gate PASS and verify_floor True.
